note: Aliases: link. Attached to a shape (shape-wide link) or to a run (inline link). Internal slide jumps use link=slide[N]; named actions use link=firstslide|lastslide|nextslide|previousslide|endshow.

link.description: external URL or internal target. pptx Set/Get canonical key on shape/run is 'link'. Alias: url.

tooltip.description: hover-text shown by PowerPoint when the link is moused over. Paired with 'link'; standalone tooltip changes are a no-op.
